reviews.review_title: I feel like it‚Äôs paid to win kind of
reviews.review_description:
I would say it‚Äôs definitely a four or five star experience. I wanna rank it three stars but I‚Äôm putting two stars to bring attention to this review now with that out of the way, I feel like the game is kind of paid to win because you need to spend PP coins for literally ANYTHING in the game and I mean anything and everything for example masks suits and paintball markers. They all need PP coins to be bought and guess what they need to be purchased and you need a lot ÔŅľof them, I will say have heard people say that you do get 100 PP coins ÔŅľ for each rank that you climb but that‚Äôs a lot of XP in between each rank, which is gonna take a really long time especially with the prices of everything in the shop just to get one set of paintball markers ÔŅľÔŅľÔŅľ so all I‚Äôm saying is make it easier to get PP coins and or lower the prices of things in the shop .
ÔŅľ

Overall the game is pretty good but when they did an update on like perks it wasn‚Äôt that good. This game is really fun. And has potential. My one star is because I have to log in and out after every game, or I lag in the second game i load into. And it REALLY affects gameplay.  You also can't hear teammates after your first loaded game. So i have lag and can't hear teammates after just ONE GAME. I have brand new quest 3 and running over 500mb download. It has nothing to do with my connection or device. I've also uninstalled and re-installed the game MULTIPLE times. They need better servers AND UPDATES. It's worse when more lobbies are open. They need to fix these things and make the game enjoyable EVERY GAME. Not just one game and then you have to exit the game, wait a couple of minutes, and try again just to hear your team and keep from lagging. Yes, it's a free game. And shouldnt expect much. But purchases are available in game and i would love to pay for paint color or outfits and all the other options because it is an enjoyable game. I just won't because it's not worth it right now. Hopefully soon these problems will be fixed.
Game is good but crowching down yeah no

I understand fixing each and every little bug people complain about is difficult, but I can two main complaints about this game. I have stickdrift, and consequently, the turn is affected, making aim and the game nearly unplayable and infuriating for me. I would like to ask if you can make a setting to disable the turning entirely. My second complaint is the delay between getting hit, and getting called out. It confuses me and makes me a little mad when I'm at D1, fully behind it, yet it says I'm out from someone laning me a second later. Thank you.
